description: An impressionist landscape depicting a waterfall or rapids at Saint-Martin. In the center, rushing white water cascades over a weir or dam, creating turbulent foam in the foreground. Behind the falls, a small stone building with an orange-red roof stands on the bank. Trees with green foliage bend slightly in the wind to the left. The sky is overcast and pale, rendered in light blues and grays. Further buildings and structures are visible in the middle distance to the right.
